g.text: May handover. Hosting renews May 2026 — flag for proactive outreach in March.

svg.text: Your client isn’t a row in a spreadsheet.
Open their page and see every active project,
every invoice, every domain — each section
has its own tab, no switching between tools.
Projects with total value, amount invoiced, and current status
Full invoice history across projects and maintenance contracts
Hosting costs, domain expiry dates, and contract end dates
Pipeline and open proposals linked to the same client
